_meta.purpose: Future source-of-truth shape for an eventual tool_registry.json. This file is documentation only. It is not loaded by any runtime, has no JSON Schema validation yet, and contains no auth, model, or chain bindings.
do_not: Do not import this file from any Python module.
Do not rename it to tool_registry.json without an explicit decision per docs/ai/integration-plan.md → Phase 1 entry criteria.
Do not add fields beyond the documented shape until a runtime is chosen.
Do not include the deferred /api/image/geo-analyze endpoint.

field_legend.name: snake_case stable identifier; intended as future tool_id
field_legend.route: HTTP path on the Flask server
field_legend.input_shape_summary: human-readable summary of expected payload — NOT JSON Schema
field_legend.output_shape_summary: human-readable summary of response top-level fields — NOT JSON Schema
field_legend.idempotent: yes / no / partial — whether identical input always yields identical logical result
field_legend.writes_file: yes / no / conditional — whether the call writes to outputs/ on success
field_legend.ready: ready / partial / not_ready — suitability for a future orchestration wrapper

tools.name: advisor_health
tools.notes: First call may take 30–90 s on cold start (embedding model lazy-load). rag_ready=true does not imply non-empty corpus.

tools.name: price_index
tools.output_shape_summary: { status, summary{ n_records, n_regions, avg_yoy_pct, highest_region, lowest_region }, regions[] }

tools.name: valuation
tools.input_shape_summary: { location, property_type, valuation_purpose, area, price_per_meter? } and optional advanced fields
tools.output_shape_summary: { status, market_value, avm{ applied, confidence, n_records, avm_ppm, ... }, excel_url, purpose_report_url }
tools.notes: Writes one .xlsm and one .docx to outputs/ on every successful call (unique report ID). AVM auto-injection occurs when price_per_meter is omitted and purpose ∈ {fair_market_value, bank_financing, tax_assessment, acquisition}. A future wrapper MUST default to a server-side dry_run before being exposed to autonomous agents (see integration-plan.md → Phase 3).

tools.name: hbu_analyze
tools.output_shape_summary: { status, recommended_use, recommended_npv, recommendation_note, scenarios_evaluated[], comparison_table[] }
tools.notes: Pure financial-engine call. The default response does not include a generated file; an optional Word report can be requested via a flag, which a wrapper MUST keep disabled by default.

tools.name: reit_nav
tools.output_shape_summary: { status, result{ gross_asset_value, total_liabilities, nav, nav_per_unit, weighted_cap_rate_pct, ltv_pct, gearing_ratio_pct, health_label }, excel_url? }
tools.notes: Deterministic — TESTED_BASELINES.md → Baseline 5 documents ±0.01% tolerance on identical inputs. Excel export is opt-in via export_excel=true; a wrapper MUST omit this flag in the default call.

tools.name: eia_assess
tools.output_shape_summary: { status, category, result{ classification{ category_label, composite_score }, impact_assessment{ n_critical, avg_impact_score }, investment_linkage{ erf, market_value, adjusted_market_value, value_at_risk } }, word_url, excel_url }
tools.notes: Always writes a Word report and an Excel summary on success. Same dry_run requirement as valuation before autonomous use.

tools.name: image_analyze
tools.output_shape_summary: { status, tag, has_gps, gps_lat?, gps_lng?, saved_as }
tools.notes: Same image yields same tag/has_gps, but each upload is saved under a uniquely-named file. GPS extraction code path is unverified (see DEFERRED_ITEMS.md → D1). A wrapper MUST treat gps_lat / gps_lng as best-effort until D1 is closed, and MUST NOT be enabled before Phase 3 entry criteria are met.

excluded_endpoints.reason: Not implemented (DEFERRED_ITEMS.md → D2). 9 of 14 expected response fields have no traceable contract. Cannot be wrapped until restored or redesigned.
